src: Sleek, silver over-ear headphones with cushioned ear pads and adjustable headband. Smooth metallic finish with engraved logos on each side. Visible buttons and ports on the ear cups.
edit: Brightly colored kids headphones with playful patterns on the ear cups. Thick, plush ear pads in vivid hues. Decorative stickers and cartoon decals add a whimsical touch to the design.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object rests on a dark blue fuzzy blanket, slightly tilted. Background includes fuzzy textures, with a hint of a shiny surface on the side, and soft fabric folds visible.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object hangs on a wall over colorful bath towels, showing the side with multiple buttons. Towels include green and pale pink, with a bathroom shelf in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object stands upright on a windowsill beside a yellow and white tissue box. Behind, a window reveals a view of green trees and parked cars on a street.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object hangs from a silver door lever against a wooden door. Door and handle details include a long, metallic lever and light wood grain texture in the room.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object rests on a wooden shelf with various decorative items. Background includes a white wall, plants with purple flowers, and a small figure, giving a cozy indoor scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object lies flat on a textured, black surface, with its ear cups facing up. Background features a neat, wood-textured surface beneath the shiny, sleek headphones.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object lays flat on a soft, quilted white bedding with visible stitching patterns. The background provides a clean, minimal setting with pillows and the edge of a bed.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object rests on a dreamy, fluffy pastel cloud blanket, slightly tilted. Background includes cloud-like textures, with a glimpse of ethereal sparkles and soft fabric folds visible in a dream world.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object hangs on a wall over fantastical bath towels in dream world colors, showing the side with playful buttons. Towels include vibrant green and magical pink, with a dreamy bathroom shelf.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object stands upright on a windowsill beside a colorful checkered tissue box. Behind, a window reveals a view of enchanted trees and whimsical parked cars as part of a dream world.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object hangs from a glittery door lever against a rainbow-colored wooden door. Door and handle details include a sparkling lever and rainbow grain texture in the dream world room.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object rests on a whimsical wooden shelf with various dream world decorative items. Background includes a textured wall, fantasy plants with purple flowers, and a dreamy small figure.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object lies flat on a textured, pastel surface, with ear cups facing up. Background features a whimsical wood-textured surface beneath the colorful, playful headphones in the dream world.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object lays flat on a soft, quilted pastel bedding with dream world stitching patterns. The background provides a serene setting with fluffy pillows and the dreamy edge of a bed.
